title: Bomber Battle Arena
description: Bomber Battle Arena is an exciting 3D collecting game that lets you play as a bomb-wielding character. Your goal is to strategically detonate bombs to clear various green plants and tree stumps, collect a golden key, and reach the treasure chest to advance to the next level. Be careful of the bomb’s blast radius and avoid contact with other monsters along the way. Get ready for an explosive adventure through 10 challenging levels full of explosive action!
instructions: WASD to move four directions Space to plant a bomb
